guest.exec_model: The PoC is a single userspace C program cross-compiled into the guest rootfs and run as root inside QEMU. A KASAN report on the kernel log is the crash signal.

entrypoints.driver: Create two AF_UNIX SOCK_STREAM sockets, bind one to a path, listen, connect from the other, accept — triggers unix_stream_connect → copy_peercred which installs sk_peer_pid and sk_peer_cred.
entrypoints.notes: Installs sk_peer_pid at af_unix.c:715 and sk_peer_cred at af_unix.c:716 inside copy_peercred().

entrypoints.interface: AF_UNIX SOCK_STREAM socket, sendmsg(2) with SCM_RIGHTS then recvmsg(2) with MSG_PEEK
entrypoints.driver: Send a message with SCM_RIGHTS ancillary data (file descriptors), then recvmsg with MSG_PEEK — triggers unix_stream_recvmsg → unix_peek_fds which installs scm_cookie.fp.
entrypoints.notes: Installs scm_cookie.fp at af_unix.c:1777 inside unix_peek_fds().

entrypoints.interface: AF_UNIX SOCK_STREAM socket, recvmsg(2) without MSG_PEEK after SCM_RIGHTS send
entrypoints.driver: After sendmsg with SCM_RIGHTS and a MSG_PEEK recvmsg, do a normal recvmsg (flags=0) — triggers unix_stream_recvmsg → unix_detach_fds which installs scm_cookie.fp.
entrypoints.notes: Installs scm_cookie.fp at scm.c:131 inside unix_detach_fds().

entrypoints.driver: Same as unix_copy_peercred — copy_peercred installs both sk_peer_pid (af_unix.c:715) and sk_peer_cred (af_unix.c:716) in a single connect call.
